title: CommitmentExtraction
description: Extraction-only output: a single commitment candidate detected from conversation text. This skill never persists the result as a final task.

decision.description: Classification of the utterance under the extraction rules.

task_title.description: Short actionable title of the commitment or event. May be empty for 'ignore'.

type.description: Who is obligated to perform the task.

name.description: Display name of the actor when known, otherwise null.

beneficiary.description: Who benefits from or is owed the task. Null if unspecified.

due_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when inferable, otherwise null.

due_text.description: Raw deadline phrasing from the text (e.g. 'by Friday'). Empty if none.

confidence.description: Model confidence in the extraction, 0.0 to 1.0.

source_evidence.description: Verbatim excerpt from the conversation supporting this extraction.

actionable_verb.description: Text contains a concrete actionable verb.

actor_identified.description: An identifiable obligated actor is present.

timeline_present.description: An explicit or inferable deadline is present.

explicit_acceptance.description: The authenticated user accepted the responsibility.

missing_fields.description: Fields that could not be determined from the text.
